title: Add inverse_transform to scalers (StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler, MaxAbsScaler, RobustScaler, QuantileTransformer, PowerTransformer)
description:
sklearn provides inverse_transform on every scaler, used to map back to original feature space (essential for pipelines that wrap a regressor). Currently missing on ferrolearn scalers.

Implementation per scaler:
- StandardScaler: x = (x_scaled * scale) + mean
- MinMaxScaler: x = x_scaled * (max - min) / (1 - 0) + min
- MaxAbsScaler: x = x_scaled * max_abs
- RobustScaler: x = (x_scaled * iqr) + median
- QuantileTransformer: invert via stored quantile bins
- PowerTransformer: invert Yeo-Johnson via per-feature lambda
